concept: Players manage an ice cream shop, taking customer orders, then moving through distinct stations: the Build Station for selecting cups and ice cream flavors, the Scoop Station for scooping precise portions, and the Topping Station for adding syrups and candies. The game evaluates performance based on order accuracy (scoop size, topping placement) and speed, awarding tips and daily scores.
name: Papa's Scooperia To Go!
